# Senthil Nagappan

> Portfolio of Senthil Kumar Nagappan — AI safety, human systems integration, and accessibility leadership for healthcare, federal, and regulated environments.

Single-page portfolio with sections for case studies, about, approach, resume, and contact.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, hero, and entry points into case studies, about, approach, resume, and contact.
- [Resume PDF](/Senthil_Nagappan_Resume.pdf): Downloadable resume.
